message: Tailwind class 'space-x' or 'space-y' detected. Using space-x/y utilities on flex layouts can cause layout bugs (especially in RTL or with hidden children). Prefer using flexbox gap utilities ('gap-x', 'gap-y', or 'gap') instead.

Tailwind class 'space-x' or 'space-y' detected. Using space-x/y utilities on flex layouts can cause layout bugs (especially in RTL or with hidden children). Prefer using flexbox gap utilities ('gap-x', 'gap-y', or 'gap') instead.
